title: arctostaphylos angustifolia
intro: Arctostaphylos angustifolia, also known as the narrowleaf manzanita or greenleaf manzanita, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Arctostaphylos angustifolia include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
